vocabulary.name: CoinPaprika API Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Domain terms used in the CoinPaprika cryptocurrency market data API.

terms.label: Coin ID
terms.description: Unique slug-style identifier for a cryptocurrency, combining symbol and name (e.g., btc-bitcoin, eth-ethereum).

terms.label: Symbol
terms.description: Short ticker symbol for a cryptocurrency as traded on exchanges.

terms.label: Rank
terms.description: Market capitalization rank of a cryptocurrency, where rank 1 is the highest market cap.

terms.label: Price (USD)
terms.description: Current price of the cryptocurrency denominated in US dollars.

terms.label: Price (BTC)
terms.description: Current price of the cryptocurrency denominated in Bitcoin.

terms.label: 24h Volume (USD)
terms.description: Total trading volume over the last 24 hours in US dollars.

terms.label: Market Cap (USD)
terms.description: Total market capitalization of the cryptocurrency in US dollars (price * circulating supply).

terms.label: Circulating Supply
terms.description: Number of coins currently in circulation and available in the market.

terms.label: Total Supply
terms.description: Total number of coins that exist including those not currently in circulation.

terms.label: Max Supply
terms.description: Maximum number of coins that will ever exist for this cryptocurrency.

terms.label: 1h Price Change (%)
terms.description: Percentage change in price over the last 1 hour.

terms.label: 24h Price Change (%)
terms.description: Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours.

terms.label: 7d Price Change (%)
terms.description: Percentage change in price over the last 7 days.

terms.label: Last Updated
terms.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) indicating when the data was last refreshed.

terms.label: Bitcoin Dominance (%)
terms.description: Bitcoin's market cap as a percentage of the total cryptocurrency market cap.

terms.label: Number of Cryptocurrencies
terms.description: Total count of tracked cryptocurrencies in the CoinPaprika database.

terms.label: Is New
terms.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the coin or ICO was added to CoinPaprika within the last 5 days.

terms.label: Is Active
terms.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the cryptocurrency is currently actively traded.

terms.label: Coin Counter
terms.description: Number of cryptocurrencies associated with a given tag.

terms.label: ICO Counter
terms.description: Number of ICO projects associated with a given tag.

terms.label: Teams Count
terms.description: Number of cryptocurrency project teams a person is a member of.
